sentences.target: Ce pull est trop léger pour l'hiver.
sentences.reading: /sə pyl ɛ tʁo leʒe puʁ livɛʁ/

translations.fr: Ce pull est trop léger pour l'hiver.
translations.ipa: /sə pyl ɛ tʁo leʒe puʁ livɛʁ/
translations.en: This sweater is too light for winter.
translations.es: Este suéter es demasiado ligero para el invierno.
translations.de: Dieser Pullover ist zu dünn für den Winter.
translations.it: Questo maglione è troppo leggero per l'inverno.
translations.ko: 이 스웨터는 겨울에 입기엔 너무 얇아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这件毛衣对冬天来说太薄了。
translations.yue: 呢件冷衫對冬天嚟講太薄。
translations.ru: Этот свитер слишком тонкий для зимы.
translations.pt: Este suéter é leve demais para o inverno.
translations.tr: Bu kazak kış için fazla ince.
translations.vi: Chiếc áo len này quá mỏng cho mùa đông.
translations.nl: Deze trui is te dun voor de winter.
translations.uk: Цей светр надто тонкий для зими.
translations.hu: Ez a pulóver túl vékony a télre.
translations.hi: यह स्वेटर सर्दियों के लिए बहुत पतला है.
translations.pl: Ten sweter jest zbyt cienki na zimę.
translations.el: Αυτό το πουλόβερ είναι πολύ λεπτό για τον χειμώνα.
translations.nb: Denne genseren er for tynn til vinteren.
translations.id: Sweater ini terlalu tipis untuk musim dingin.
translations.sv: Den här tröjan är för tunn för vintern.
translations.ro: Acest pulover este prea subțire pentru iarnă.
translations.cs: Tento svetr je na zimu příliš tenký.
translations.da: Denne sweater er for tynd til vinteren.
translations.fi: Tämä neule on liian ohut talvea varten.
translations.ja: このセーターは冬には薄すぎます。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, introducing the noun 'pull' (subject).
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject 'Ce pull' to the predicate adjective 'léger'.
Degree adverb of excess modifying the adjective 'léger'.
Adjective, masculine singular; predicate adjective agreeing with 'pull' after the copula.
Preposition introducing the complement 'l'hiver' (temporal/goal complement: for the winter).
Noun with elided definite article attached (l' = le); object of the preposition 'pour'.

translations.it: Queste scarpe da ginnastica sono molto leggere.
translations.vi: Đôi giày thể thao này rất nhẹ.
translations.pl: Te buty sportowe są bardzo lekkie.
translations.el: Αυτά τα αθλητικά παπούτσια είναι πολύ ελαφριά.
translations.sv: De här gympaskorna är väldigt lätta.
translations.ja: このスニーカーはとても軽いです。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, plural; introduces 'baskets' (subject).
Common noun, feminine plural in usage; head of the subject.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicate adjective 'légères'.
Degree adverb intensifying the predicate adjective.
Adjective, feminine plural; predicate adjective agreeing with 'baskets'.

sentences.target: Je prends un café léger, merci.

translations.fr: Je prends un café léger, merci.
translations.en: I'll have a light coffee, thanks.
translations.de: Ich nehme einen milden Kaffee, danke.
translations.yue: 我要一杯淡嘅咖啡，多謝。
translations.pt: Vou querer um café fraco, obrigado.
translations.vi: Cho tôi một ly cà phê nhạt, cảm ơn.
translations.nl: Ik neem een milde koffie, bedankt.
translations.el: Θα πάρω έναν ελαφρύ καφέ, ευχαριστώ.
translations.nb: Jeg tar en mild kaffe, takk.
translations.id: Saya pesan kopi yang tidak terlalu kuat, terima kasih.
translations.sv: Jag tar ett milt kaffe, tack.
translations.da: Jeg tager en mild kaffe, tak.
translations.ja: 薄いコーヒーをください、ありがとうございます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, 1st person singular present; governs the direct object 'un café léger'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'café'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'prends'.
Attributive adjective, masculine singular; post-nominal modifier of 'café'.
Interjection used for politeness; not syntactically integrated with the clause.

sentences.target: Nous préférons un repas léger ce soir.
sentences.reading: /nu pʁefeʁɔ̃ œ̃ ʁəpa leʒe sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Nous préférons un repas léger ce soir.
translations.ipa: /nu pʁefeʁɔ̃ œ̃ ʁəpa leʒe sə swaʁ/
translations.en: We prefer a light meal tonight.
translations.es: Preferimos una comida ligera esta noche.
translations.de: Wir bevorzugen heute Abend eine leichte Mahlzeit.
translations.ko: 우리는 오늘 밤 가벼운 식사를 선호해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今晚更喜欢清淡的饭菜。
translations.yue: 我哋今晚比較想食清淡嘅嘢。
translations.pt: Preferimos uma refeição leve esta noite.
translations.tr: Bu akşam hafif bir yemek tercih ediyoruz.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng tôi thích ăn bữa nhẹ.
translations.nl: We geven de voorkeur aan een lichte maaltijd vanavond.
translations.uk: Ми віддаємо перевагу легкій вечері сьогодні.
translations.hu: Mi inkább könnyű vacsorát szeretnénk ma este.
translations.hi: हम आज रात हल्का भोजन पसंद करते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi foretrekker et lett måltid i kveld.
translations.id: Kami lebih suka makan malam yang ringan malam ini.
translations.sv: Vi föredrar en lätt måltid i kväll.
translations.ro: Preferăm o masă ușoară în seara asta.
translations.cs: Dáváme přednost lehkému jídлу dnes večer.
translations.da: Vi foretrækker et let måltid i aften.
translations.ja: 今夜は軽い食事を好みます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person plural.
Main verb, 1st person plural present; takes 'un repas léger' as direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'repas'.
Common noun, masculine (invariable in number); head of the direct object NP.
Attributive adjective, masculine singular; post-nominal modifier of 'repas'.
Demonstrative determiner with temporal value in the fixed expression 'ce soir' (this evening).
Common noun; with 'ce' forms an adverbial time expression meaning 'tonight'.
